title: Problem
body: Overlap-aware ASR should separate selectively instead of assuming separation always helps.

title: Pipeline
body: Mixed ASR, separated ASR, duplicate suppression, adaptive routing, and speaker-aware evaluation form the main decision loop.

title: Findings
body: Selective separation beats blind separation in the current gold benchmark. router_v2 is the balanced default, while cleaned separated output is the robust fallback.

title: Frontier
body: Breadth-first artifacts now exist for compute-aware cascade, MeetEval compatibility, speaker profile risk signaling, and qualitative critic notes.
